achievements.title: Double Barrel Jump
achievements.description: Jump two barrels (or a barrel and a flame) at once and collect 300 points, and with Lives set to 3

achievements.title: Triple Barrel Jump
achievements.description: Jump three barrels at once and collect 800 points, and with Lives set to 3

achievements.title: Quadruple Barrel Jump
achievements.description: Jump at least four barrels at once and collect 800 points, and with Lives set to 3
achievements.author: KloggMonkey

achievements.title: Hammer Time: Girders
achievements.description: Collect both hammers in Level 1 Stage 1 on the same life, and with Lives set to 3

achievements.description: Collect both hammers in Level 1 Stage 2 on the same life, and with Lives set to 3

achievements.description: Collect both hammers in Level 3 Stage 2 on the same life, and with Lives set to 3

achievements.title: Hey You Dropped These: Rivets
achievements.description: Collect all 3 of Pauline's items in Level 1 Stage 2 on the same life, and with Lives set to 3

achievements.description: Collect all 3 of Pauline's items in Level 2 Stage 2 on the same life, and with Lives set to 3

achievements.title: Hey You Dropped These: Conveyors
achievements.description: Collect all 3 of Pauline's items in Level 3 Stage 2 without losing a life, and with Lives set to 3

achievements.title: Elevator Antics: 50m Shortcut
achievements.description: Take the shortcut in Level 2 Stage 2 and finish with 5,200 or more bonus points left, and with Lives set to 3

achievements.title: Elevator Antics II: 75m Shortcut
achievements.description: Take the shortcut in Level 3 Stage 3 and finish with 6,000 or more bonus points left, and with Lives set to 3

achievements.title: Respectable Score
achievements.description: Score 25,000 points with Lives set to 3
